## Summary

- Post or docs changed:
- Public URL target:

## Public-content checklist

- [ ] All sources are public or explicitly sanitized.
- [ ] No private conversation, raw or private path, internal URL, credential, personal data, or confidential detail is exposed.
- [ ] Claims depending on private context are generalized or removed.
- [ ] Reproducibility claims point to public artifacts or clearly say "not released".
- [ ] Method/result/limitations are concrete enough to avoid workslop.
- [ ] Human publication owner reviewed this PR.

## Verification

- [ ] Local Jekyll build passes.
- [ ] Link/content safety check passes.
- [ ] Originality check against `docs/reference-synthesis.md` passes.
